name: Jourdeness Group Limited
summary: Jourdeness Group Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and distributes cosmetics. It is involved in the beauty and body spa business, which include online beauty courses; and management and consulting activities. It operates approximately 640 skin care and spa direct and franchise chain stores in Taiwan, Mainland China, and Malaysia. Jourdeness Group Limited was founded in 2010 and is headquartered in the Grand Cayman, the Cayman Islands.
